city.description: The name of the city. Maximum length: 3000 characters.

country.description:
The two-character ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 country code. For example, **US**.
> If you don't know the country or are not collecting the country from the shopper, provide `country` as `ZZ`.

houseNumberOrName.description: The number or name of the house. Maximum length: 3000 characters.

postalCode.description: A maximum of five digits for an address in the US, or a maximum of ten characters for an address in all other countries.

stateOrProvince.description:
The two-character ISO 3166-2 state or province code. For example, **CA** in the US or **ON** in Canada.
> Required for the US and Canada.

street.description:
The name of the street. Maximum length: 3000 characters.
> The house number should not be included in this field; it should be separately provided via `houseNumberOrName`.
